projectOverview.name: App
projectOverview.domain: Responsible for user authentication and authorization.

boundedContexts.name: Authentication
boundedContexts.purpose: Responsible for user authentication and authorization.

boundedContexts.name: Catalog Management
boundedContexts.purpose: Handles the management of films, actors, categories, and related entities.

boundedContexts.name: Location Management
boundedContexts.purpose: Responsible for managing geographical and location-related data.

boundedContexts.name: Payment Processing
boundedContexts.purpose: Handles payment transactions and related operations.

boundedContexts.name: Rental Management
boundedContexts.purpose: Manages rental transactions and related entities.

boundedContexts.name: Store Management
boundedContexts.purpose: Responsible for managing store inventory and sales.

businessRules.name: Film ID must not be null
businessRules.description: Ensures that every inventory record is associated with a valid film.

businessRules.name: Store ID must not be null
businessRules.description: Ensures that every inventory record is associated with a valid store.

businessRules.name: Last update timestamp must not be null
businessRules.description: Ensures that every record has a last update timestamp for tracking changes.
businessRules.sourceMethod: InventoryEntity, StoreEntity, StaffEntity, RentalEntity, PaymentEntity, AddressEntity, CityEntity, CountryEntity, LanguageEntity, CustomerEntity, ActorEntity, FilmEntity, FilmCategoryEntity, FilmActorEntity

businessRules.name: Username size constraint
businessRules.description: Ensures that the username is between 1 and 16 characters.

businessRules.name: Address must not be null and must have valid size
businessRules.description: Ensures that the address is provided and within the specified size limits.

businessRules.name: District must not be null and must have valid size
businessRules.description: Ensures that the district is provided and within the specified size limits.

businessRules.name: Phone must not be null and must have valid size
businessRules.description: Ensures that the phone number is provided and within the specified size limits.

businessRules.name: Email must be valid and not null
businessRules.description: Ensures that the email is valid and provided for user authentication.

businessRules.name: Transaction boundaries for read operations
businessRules.description: Read operations are executed in a read-only transaction to prevent data modification.

businessRules.name: Transaction boundaries for write operations
businessRules.description: Write operations are executed in a transactional context to ensure data integrity.

businessRules.name: Active status must be true for customers and staff
businessRules.description: Ensures that only active customers and staff can perform certain operations.

businessRules.name: Authority ID must not be null
businessRules.description: Ensures that every staff and customer is assigned a valid authority.

businessRules.name: Rental duration must be specified
businessRules.description: Ensures that every film has a defined rental duration.

businessRules.name: Rental rate must be specified
businessRules.description: Ensures that every film has a defined rental rate.

businessRules.name: Replacement cost must be specified
businessRules.description: Ensures that every film has a defined replacement cost.

businessRules.name: Film title must not be null and must have valid size
businessRules.description: Ensures that every film has a title that is provided and within the specified size limits.

businessRules.name: Film description must have valid size
businessRules.description: Ensures that the film description is within the specified size limits.

modules.name: Customer
businessRules: Only active customers may rent DVDs
Email must be unique across all customers
Customer must belong to exactly one store

endpoints.description: Get list of all customers with optional filtering
Get a single customer by ID
Delete a customer (soft delete by setting active=false)

useCases.name: Manage Rental List
useCases.description: As a staff member, I want to manage the list of rentals so that I can track customer rentals.
steps: User requests the list of rentals
System retrieves the list of rentals
System displays the list to the user

useCases.name: Rent DVD
useCases.description: As a customer, I want to rent a DVD so that I can enjoy watching it.
steps: Customer selects a DVD to rent
Staff member processes the rental
System records the rental transaction

useCases.name: Return DVD
useCases.description: As a customer, I want to return a DVD so that I can complete my rental transaction.
steps: Customer returns the DVD
Staff member processes the return
System updates the rental status

useCases.name: Manage Payment List
useCases.description: As a staff member, I want to manage the list of payments so that I can track customer payments.
steps: User requests the list of payments
System retrieves the list of payments
System displays the list to the user

useCases.name: Create Payment
useCases.description: As a customer, I want to make a payment so that I can settle my rental transactions.
steps: Customer submits payment details
Staff member processes the payment
System records the payment transaction

useCases.name: Manage Customer List
useCases.description: As a staff member, I want to manage the list of customers so that I can ensure accurate customer information.
steps: User requests the list of customers
System retrieves the list of customers
System displays the list to the user

useCases.name: Add New Customer
useCases.description: As a staff member, I want to add a new customer so that I can ensure proper customer registration.
steps: User submits customer details
System validates the input
System adds the new customer to the database

useCases.name: Update Customer Information
useCases.description: As a staff member, I want to update customer information so that I can keep the data accurate.
steps: User submits updated customer information
System validates the input
System updates the customer information in the database

useCases.name: Delete Customer
useCases.description: As a staff member, I want to delete a customer so that I can remove outdated or incorrect entries.
steps: User requests to delete a customer
System verifies the request
System deletes the customer from the database

modules.name: Rental
businessRules: Rental date must not be null
Only active customers can create rentals
Inventory item must be available (no open rental) before renting
Staff member must be from the same store as the inventory item

endpoints.description: Get list of all rental transactions
Create a new rental (rent a DVD)

useCases.name: Manage Rental List
useCases.description: As a staff member, I want to manage the list of rentals so that I can track customer rentals.
steps: User requests the list of rentals
System retrieves the list of rentals
System displays the list to the user

useCases.name: Return DVD
useCases.description: As a customer, I want to return a DVD so that I can complete my rental transaction.
steps: Customer returns the DVD
Staff member processes the return
System updates the rental status

useCases.name: Create Payment
useCases.description: As a customer, I want to make a payment so that I can settle my rental transactions.
steps: Customer submits payment details
Staff member processes the payment
System records the payment transaction

modules.name: Store

properties.name: managerStaffId
properties.constraints: not null, unique, FK to staff

businessRules: Each store must have exactly one manager
Manager must be a staff member assigned to that store
Store ID must not be null in inventory records

useCases.name: Report Sales by Store
useCases.description: As a manager, I want to view sales reports by store so that I can evaluate store performance.
steps: User requests sales report by store
System retrieves sales data grouped by store
System returns the report to the user

useCases.name: Manage Store List
useCases.description: As an administrator, I want to manage the list of stores so that I can ensure accurate store information.
steps: User requests the list of stores
System retrieves the list of stores
System displays the list to the user

useCases.name: Add New Store
useCases.description: As an administrator, I want to add a new store so that I can expand the business.
steps: User submits store details
System validates the input
System adds the new store to the database

useCases.name: Update Store Information
useCases.description: As an administrator, I want to update store information so that I can keep the data accurate.
steps: User submits updated store information
System validates the input
System updates the store information in the database

useCases.name: Delete Store
useCases.description: As an administrator, I want to delete a store so that I can remove outdated or incorrect entries.
steps: User requests to delete a store
System verifies the request
System deletes the store from the database
